summary: Install-time system information exfiltration via postinstall hook
details: The package executes a postinstall script (postinstall.js) that imports http, os, and child_process and transmits host identifiers including os.hostname() to a remote endpoint over HTTP at install time. The script's combined use of os information gathering, child_process, and an outbound http.request from a lifecycle hook matches the shape of a system-information beacon that fires automatically on `npm install`, with no advertised purpose for the package that would justify this behavior.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
